    bitlen = bigInt.bit_length()

    bigBytes = bigInt.to_bytes((bitlen + 7) // 8, 'big')
    
    if (bigInt.bit_length() % 8 != 0) and ((bigInt.bit_length() // 8 + 1) == (bitlen // 8)):
        return bigBytes

    resizedBytes[startDst:startDst+len] = bigBytes[startSrc:]
    
    return bytes(resizedBytes)
